hypothesis: A narrow Qwen3.6:35b exact-frequency policy patch on top of builder-gap v1 improves L2 paired local-gap records by preserving explicit counts, windows, ranges, and cluster structure instead of replacing them with coarser labels such as multiple, unknown, or non-cluster rates.
metric_caveats: All records come from GPT-correct/Qwen-failed paired builder-gap v1 validation outcomes; this is a targeted policy gate, not full-validation evidence.

The varied factor is prompt policy only: program variant, candidate builder implementation, scorer, split, model, context policy, and repair policy remain fixed against the Qwen builder-gap v1 full-validation run.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing on this slice only.
Normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, evidence support, and candidate coverage remain diagnostic.
Do not extrapolate slice metrics to the full validation split.
This is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
